arts.sum: Oliver Sonne has bee advised to avoid living in Burnley now he’s signed for the club, at least according to ‘legend’ Brian ‘The Beast’ Jensen. He’s been speaking to Tipsbladet today about the 24-year-old’s move to Turf Moor today, offering his own advice on how to be a success at the club.
